nasb.text: The length of each curtain shall be twenty-eight cubits, and the width of each curtain four cubits; all the curtains shall have the same measurements.

esv.text: The length of each curtain shall be twenty-eight cubits, and the breadth of each curtain four cubits; all the curtains shall be the same size.

cnv.text: 每幅幔子要長十二公尺，寬兩公尺，每幅幔子都要一樣的尺寸。

ccb.text: 每幅幔子的尺寸都一样，长十二米、宽两米。
